title: Spa Birthday Party Decoration, Makeup Party Supplies, Plates Cups Napkins Tablecloth Happy Birthday Banner Balloons Cake Toppers for Girls Women Slumber Pamper Spa Birthday Party Favors
features: 🌸Spa Party Decorations: If you want to look for party ideas for your girl's birthday party, this Spa party supplies set can completely meet your needs, the plate and happy birthday backdrop are designed with lovely enchanted lipstick, perfume, liquid foundation, makeup bags, eye black, mirrors, etc. Unique pink spa-themed elements design can make your party more vivid and attractive, bright and vibrant color matching, more can create around immersive party atmosphere, impressive!

🌸Makeup Birthday Decorations: 1PC Happy Birthday Banner + 1PC HAPPY BIRTHDAY cake topper + 10PCS cupcake topper + 18PCS balloons（pink,blue,white/6pcs）+ 20PCS 9" dinner plates + 20PCS 7" dessert plates + 20PCS 9oz paper cups + 20PCS napkins + 20PCS straws + 1PC pink Makeup Spa table cover.
🌸Materials: All plates, paper napkins, and banners are made of paper cardboard. They do not tear or break easily. Perfect to serve desserts, food for parties, and drinks.

💕Easy to DIY: The Spa happy birthday banner comes with Pre-strung, just take a little bit of time to blow up the balloon and DIY your girl birthday, and create a perfect photo prop for your Child's party.

🌸 Wide Applications: Makeup party supplies are versatile and perfect for various occasions such as makeup theme birthday parties, and slumber party decorations, but also for spa day parties, girls' spa parties, kids spa parties, pink parties, spa-themed birthday parties, spa table decorations, and other theme party decor.
